key_components: async_engine - in-memory SQLite with async support
session - AsyncSession factory with proper cleanup
client - async HTTP client with dependency override for database
issues: No explicit error handling in fixtures
Mock services created with MagicMock but async methods mocked separately

patterns_discovered.description: All tests use @pytest.mark.asyncio with async def pattern for proper async/await handling
patterns_discovered.impact: Enables testing of async API without blocking

patterns_discovered.description: _create_draft() method in TestStatusTransitions reduces code duplication
patterns_discovered.impact: DRY principle applied to test setup

patterns_discovered.description: Sequential transitions (draft → validated → scheduled → published) with both valid and invalid paths tested
Tests cover both happy path and error cases (404, 422) for each operation
patterns_discovered.impact: Ensures error handling is properly implemented

patterns_discovered.description: Tests verify system defaults (language='pt', version=1, status='draft')
session fixture depends on async_engine; client fixture depends on session
patterns_discovered.impact: Proper isolation and cleanup of test resources

gotchas_discovered.description: Session marked as FAILED despite complete implementation - reason unknown from diff alone
likely_causes: Actual API endpoints may not exist or differ from expected paths
Mock services may not be properly injected into tested components
Database fixture may fail to create tables without proper model imports
Async fixtures may have timing or context issues

gotchas_discovered.description: Tests hardcode endpoint paths (/api/content, /api/content/{id}/status) - changes require test updates
gotchas_discovered.impact: Tests become brittle if routing changes
Test fails if default language differs or is configurable

gotchas_discovered.description: TestVersioning assumes versions start at 1 and increment by 1 for each update
gotchas_discovered.impact: Test breaks if versioning logic differs

gotchas_discovered.description: Fixtures auto-discovered by pytest but no explicit scope documentation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could lead to unexpected fixture reuse across test boundaries

reasons_for_failure: Implementation endpoints may not be accessible or properly wired
Fixture setup may fail during test execution
Dependency injection overrides may not work as expected

recommendations.recommendation: Run pytest with verbose output to identify actual failure cause
Verify all API endpoint implementations exist and match test paths
recommendations.action: Check if /api/content and related routes are properly registered in app

recommendations.recommendation: Verify fixture dependency injection is properly configured
recommendations.action: Test that app.dependency_overrides[get_session] is correctly applied

recommendations.recommendation: Add tests for mock service integration
recommendations.action: Create tests that verify mock_ai_service and mock_validation_service are injected

recommendations.recommendation: Add edge case tests for concurrent operations
recommendations.action: Test race conditions in version creation and status transitions

recommendations.recommendation: Extract magic strings (endpoint paths) into constants
recommendations.action: Create APIEndpoints enum or constants module

recommendations.recommendation: Add parametrized tests for content types and channels
recommendations.action: Use @pytest.mark.parametrize for testing multiple content types
